playwright.description: Microsoft Playwright MCP for browser automation on Windows.

filesystem.description: Controlled filesystem access limited to common user folders.

memory.description: MCP knowledge-graph memory for runtime notes and relationships.

fetch.description: Official MCP fetch server. Enable after installing uv or mcp-server-fetch.

time.description: Official MCP time and timezone utilities. Enable after installing uv or mcp-server-time.

git.description: Official MCP Git server scoped to the Tecno J.A.R.V.I.S repository.

chrome_devtools.description: Chrome DevTools MCP for debugging Chrome tabs, console, network and performance.

context7.description: Context7 MCP for current library/framework documentation.

tavily.description: Tavily advanced web search MCP. Requires TAVILY_API_KEY in the environment.

google_workspace.description: Google Workspace MCP for Drive, Docs, Sheets, Gmail and Calendar. Requires OAuth setup before enabling.

gmail.description: Gmail-specific MCP with auto-auth. Enable only after reviewing permissions.

google_calendar.description: Google Calendar MCP. Safer first Google integration than full Gmail/Drive access.
